data.title: Civitas Capital Group files Form I-956F for Class A Multifamily Development Project in Silverthorne, CO. Key step in EB-5 process.
data.description: On December 12, 2025, Civitas Capital Group revealed the submission of Form I-956F to the United States Citizenship and Immigration Services for an EB-5 project located in downtown Silverthorne, Colorado. This marks a significant milestone in advancing the EB-5 project.

data.title: Outrig acquires new facility in Indio, California for RV, boat, and commercial storage at 84350 Cabazon Road.
data.description: Indio, California - On December 12, 2025, Outrig, a renowned company offering high-quality storage options for RVs, boats, and commercial goods, has broadened its operations in California by purchasing a state-of-the-art facility in the Coachella Valley. This new flagship location, situated at 84350 Cabazon Road, is set to enhance Outrig's offerings in the region.

data.title: Hedgeye Asset Management introduces Hedgeye 130/30 Equity ETF (HELS) managed by R. Patrick Kent for capital appreciation.
data.description: In Stamford, Connecticut, on December 12, 2025, Hedgeye Asset Management, LLC (HAM), a subsidiary of Hedgeye Risk Management, LLC, introduced the Hedgeye 130/30 Equity ETF (HELS). This actively managed exchange-traded fund aims to achieve long-term capital growth.

data.title: Luxury Christmas trend rising with 18K-gold 'Twas the Night Before Christmas edition. Artistic heirloom collectibles in demand.
data.description: In San Diego, on December 12, 2025, a new trend is emerging during the holiday season, involving ultra-luxurious Christmas heirlooms which are crafted as collectible artistic pieces rather than traditional decorations or gifts. TWAS, a holiday art studio situated in San Diego, is at the forefront of this trend. This studio has launched a unique collection of these high-end Christmas heirlooms, redefining the concept of holiday décor.

data.title: GCC Board Games & Hobby Stores Retail Market valued at $1.2 billion; Culturally-Specific Games Offer $35 Million Opportunity.
data.description: Dublin - A new report on the GCC Board Games and Hobby Stores Retail Market has been released, revealing a market value of USD 1.2 billion. This growth is driven by a surge in popularity across different demographics. Factors contributing to this expansion include the rise in disposable income and leisure time, alongside an increasing fondness for board games and hobbies. The report offers insights into growth drivers, trends, opportunities, and the competitive landscape in the market, with forecasts extending from 2025 to 2030.

data.title: Broadcom's transformation by AI giants OpenAI, Google, Meta overlooked amidst 5% stock dip. AI chips now key focus.
data.description: Broadcom Inc, listed on NASDAQ as AVGO, recently underwent a significant transformation in Silicon Valley that yielded substantial results. Despite the market's focus on a standard 5% decrease, Broadcom executed a highly profitable "quiet pivot" that showcased their shift from traditional products like switches and networking silicon. Instead, they are now closely associated with three major clients recognized as AI powerhouses: OpenAI, Alphabet Inc.'s Google, and Meta Platforms Inc. This strategic move highlights Broadcom's pivot towards AI custom chips. For more information, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: OCC approves Paxos to convert to OCC Trust for federally regulated blockchain services, including PYUSD in 50 States.
data.description: A platform focused on regulated brokerage services and stablecoin issuance for global businesses has officially launched and is accessible in 50 states across the US. PYUSD, the stablecoin issued by PayPal, is set to become the most substantial US dollar stablecoin provided by a federally regulated institution, complying with the forthcoming GENIUS regulations. data.title: PPG named in Wall Street Journal's Best-Managed Companies list for 2nd year, recognized for innovation & stakeholder engagement
data.description: In Pittsburgh, PPG (NYSE: PPG) has been named one of the Wall Street Journal’s 250 Best-Managed Companies for the second year in a row. The selection process assesses companies based on customer satisfaction, employee engagement and development, innovation, social responsibility, and financial strength. PPG secured its position among the top-scoring organizations by demonstrating dedication to disciplined innovation, stakeholder engagement, and responsible management.

data.title: FIA, Formula 1 Group, and 11 teams sign the Ninth Concorde Agreement, ensuring stability through 2030.
data.description: In Paris, the Fédération Internationale de l'Automobile (FIA) and the Formula 1 Group revealed the signing of the Concorde Governance Agreement. This pivotal contract outlines the regulatory and governance framework for the FIA Formula One World Championship until 2030. The agreement solidifies the partnership between the FIA, the global motor sport governing body, and the Formula 1 Group as the Commercial Rights Holder. Previously, in March, plans regarding the 2026 Commercial Concorde were announced, setting important guidelines for the sport's future.

data.title: CLIQ Digital AG plans to transfer to the Basic Board of Frankfurt Stock Exchange's open market on 12th Dec 2025.
data.description: CLIQ Digital AG has announced its intention to transfer to the Basic Board of the open market of the Frankfurt Stock Exchange on December 12, 2025, at 17:14 CET/CEST.
